chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1246 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5256/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.5257/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.5258/2023 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case. 23.08.2023 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner ======= O R D E R ======= MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- Petitioner claiming to be a successful candidate for the post of Assistant Secretary / Assistant Collector of Examinations in examination held on 15.07.2023, has filed this petition for setting aside a Notification dated 15.08.2023 issued by Respondent No.3 whereby certain appointments have been made against various posts in Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education (B.I.S.E), Sukkur. We have heard learned counsel for the petitioner. He has submitted that these appointments have been made in violation of the orders passed by this Court in Suit No.1564/2023 on 09.08.2023; however, he has failed to point out whether the Respondents are party in the said Suit or not? and if they have violated the orders of this Court in the above Suit why he has not filed an application in the suit under relevant provisions against them instead of filing this petition. This being the position, we have found this petition as not maintainable and dismiss it in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
